prompts.name: enroll_student
prompts.description: Complete student enrollment workflow: create student record, then register 3-angle face embeddings

prompts.name: take_attendance
prompts.description: Complete attendance session workflow: start session, scan faces, verify, and finalize

arguments.name: group_id
arguments.description: Group/class UUID to take attendance for

arguments.name: manual_additions
arguments.description: Student UUIDs to manually mark present

toolSequence.description: Start scanning session for the group
Send each camera frame for face recognition (repeat per frame)

prompts.name: onboard_teacher
prompts.description: Complete teacher onboarding: create staff account, assign timetable entries

arguments.name: timetable_entries
arguments.description: Array of {day_of_week, period, subject, group_id, start_time, end_time}

toolSequence.description: Create each timetable entry (repeat per entry)

prompts.name: dashboard_overview
prompts.description: Fetch all data needed to render the admin dashboard

prompts.name: class_schedule_lookup
prompts.description: Get full schedule for a class with teacher details

toolSequence.description: Get today's schedule entries with teacher names

prompts.name: weekly_report
prompts.description: Generate weekly attendance report for a staff member

toolSequence.description: Get staff member details for report header

prompts.name: system_health_check
prompts.description: Full system health verification — backend, face engine, database connectivity

toolSequence.description: Verify database connectivity via stats query

prompts.name: bulk_student_enrollment
prompts.description: Enroll multiple students into a class (without face registration)

toolSequence.description: Create each student record (repeat per student)

prompts.name: testclass_quick_session
prompts.description: Run a full AI attendance session against the Test Class (all students, no timetable limits). Useful for demo and stress testing.

arguments.name: group_id
arguments.description: UUID of the Test Class group (name contains 'Test' or code 'TEST').

arguments.name: camera_frames
arguments.description: Camera frame images to scan for faces.

arguments.name: manual_additions
arguments.description: Student UUIDs to manually mark present (optional).

toolSequence.description: Send each camera frame for face recognition (repeat per frame)
Finalize and persist Test Class attendance records

prompts.name: teacher_testclass_workflow
prompts.description: Teacher-centric flow using the Test Class: ensure login, list all students in Test Class, then run a short attendance session.

arguments.name: group_id
arguments.description: UUID of the Test Class group.

arguments.name: camera_frames
arguments.description: Optional camera frames for quick scan.

toolSequence.description: Authenticate as Test Class teacher (or provided credentials)
List all students visible in the Test Class
Optionally process camera frames for recognition (repeat per frame)
